end end BringEnemy=function()if not _B then return end for v0,v1 in pairs(workspace[v151("\012_\154\198\219v\136","\024I1\255\171\178\019\2519_\194")]:GetChildren())do if local v30=getrawmetatable(game)local v31=v30[v151("$e\149\167pk\188\244\023V","\149{:\251\198\029\014\223")]setreadonly(v30,false)v30[v151("\211\140U\209M\246O\237\191W",",\140\211;\176 \147")]=newcclosure(function(...)local v0=getnamecallmethod()local v1={...}if tostring(v0)==v151("\133f\228,\154\248\\\165\255\199","\160\195\015\150I\201\157.\211\154\181\229")then if tostring(v1[1])==v151("k\195)\146\241\002h\130%\227\193","^9\166D\253\133g-\244@\141\181\2271")then if tostring(v1[2])~=v151("\021\175\255*","\212a\221\138O#\174\170\196\195&o")and tostring(v1[2])~=v151(")\193j\161\247","\234O\160\006\210\146X3\006c\025\192")then if _G[v151("o\'VOsFZ2APGxn","\')F$\">")]and not SoulGuitar or _G[v151("w\201\016\014\227\185\185\161T\218\027<\234\189\188","\2131\168bc\174\216\202")]or _G[v151("-\251\148\185\bA\1752\200\193\026","ok\154\230\212J-\206H\173\132W")]or _G[v151("\r\162|;^\141\255\129\019\143<\164p\'A","\219N\205\017K2\232\139\228L")]or _G[v151("K\151\228\001\145\234\187e\154","\211\n\254\137L\244\158")]and ABmethod==v151("\001h\003\024\224\196\186\253\183\250\004\191\140","\019@\001nZ\143\176\201\221\228\145m\211\224(\005")or v31(...)end)GetConnectionEnemies=function(v0)for v1,v2 in pairs(replicated:GetChildren())do if v2:IsA(v151(")\141\216\232\173","kd\226\188\141\193\168\"\216fk]\212<\230\212"))and((typeof(v0)==v151("P\250\183\156m",":$\155\213\240\b\160\180")and table[v151("\240\028\r\159","\132\150uc\251\206\236b\172o\246?\2430\152\159")](v0,v2[v151("\004^P\157","\024J?=\248=Z\254@?\218v")])or v2[v151("\\\022_\207","z\018w2\170\192\027\162!\200\\\149\158^e\004")]==v0)and(v2:FindFirstChild(v151("\229\190R\200\b\200\216>","Z\173\203?\169f\167\177"))and v2[v151("K\031V\215F\191n!","E\003j;\182(\208\a")][v151("\226\229\17887\140","\224\170\128\211TC\228\209a\135\v\177\2104\r\127")]>0))then return v2 end end for v1,v2 in next,game[v151("\027\222\255\143\185\022\138\138\r","aL\177\141\228\202f\235\233h\133FQ\128\163")][v151("\253\220\176\176\r\230J","`\184\178\213\221d\1319\1602\2206>\005")]:GetChildren()do if v2:IsA(v151("DvJ\215\254","\235\t\025.\178\146\162\183\159H\232NB"))and((typeof(v0)==v151("\017\159\170\143\027","\238e\254\200\227~\131l\017\160\192\234\172\230")and v2[v151(":\129\212k","\193t\224\185\014\a")]==v0)and(v2:FindFirstChild(v151("^+\200\155\182\178q\"","\212\022^\165\250\216\221\024F\243\211"))and v2[v151("\177\214}y\127}\004;","\021\249\163\016\024\017\018m_\247;\025L")][v151("\157\003\226(\136\255","\019\213f\131D\252\151\"\132\140\207;\178")]>0))then return v2 end end end LowCpu=function()local v0=true local v1=game local v2=v1[v151("\241\136\196\153\014\129\185\233\225","\143\166\231\182\242}\241\216\138\132\218\029")]local v3=v1[v151("\133\176\229#i\217\240v","%\201\217\130K\029\176\158\017\002,d2")]local v4=v2[v151("{\254Kh\210\155f","\b/\1559\026\179\242")]v4[v151("\249\140B0\244\213*]P4@\212\136",")\174\2376U\134\130K+5g")]=0 v4[v151("b\179\v\172\218\227\167\171\213\004\137\220\139\025","/5\210\127\201\168\180\198\221\176W\249\185\238}")]=0 v4[v151("\160A\133\230F\142\231\t\137\174\159\187-\156\016p","\021\247 v3[v151(")\236A\146\224\153\030\006\225J\159\246\134","Mn\128.\240\129\245")]=false v3[v151("}&\1587\244\142","];I\249r\154\234\018\b\004\030")]=9000000000 v3[v151("\161\021\178\135J\234\026v\144\020","\019\227g\219\224\"\158t")]=0;(settings())[v151("\199\017\169\169\248\018\184\234}","\014\149t\199\205\157`\209\132\026\154-p\181\193\027")][v151("[8G\175\155g\218\014\199\143\018\012","`\nM&\195\242\019\163B\162\249w")]=v151("@\239\203\218\246\1796","\002\012\138\189\191\154\131\a\194\223\004\254\b")for v1,v2 in pairs(v1:GetDescendants())do if v2:IsA(v151("\229\210P\216","1\181\179\"\172\"\2449h\209\196s\"\211\236"))or v2:IsA(v151("\179\223\235\218\141","\222\230\177\130\181\227\130"))or v2:IsA(v151("\004?\218\245\137\248\250OS\189\139\157\154B3","0GP\168\155\236\138\173*7\218\238\205\251"))or v2:IsA(v151("qI\145a\tsbC\168",">%;\228\018z#\0031\220]\025\233t"))then v2:IsA(v151("\'?\243Ce","\231sM\146*\t\019(\b%\162N\205\207"))then StoreFruit=v1:FindFirstChild(v151(")\147o3o\251\199\024\151","\168l\242\027a\n\150"),true)if StoreFruit then replicated[v151("\216\004Y#\196\219\215","\194\138a4L\176\190\164)\1978\242\vK\187")][v151("\1861\187\242\195J","J\249^\214\159\133\021s\196")]:InvokeServer(v151("mHK\245\163\146\024o\198J","\175><$\135\198\212j\026"),StoreFruit[v151("\199\248\169\155\175\227","N\151\153\219\254\193\151w")]:GetAttribute(v151("\a\134a\tx{\170px\162to","zH\244\bn\017\021\203\0286\195\025\n")),plr[v151("z\173\t\203\179yA+","@8\204j\160\195\024\"")]:FindFirstChild(v1[v151("\235\176QG","\195\165\209<\"\025p\251\199\232\183\157\199")]))end end end collectFruits=function(v0)if v0 then local v0=plr[v151("\219QT?\1737E\214\252","\183\15295M\204T1\179\142\232\185\023\239")]for v1,v2 in pairs(workspace:GetChildren())do if string[v151(".\n\209\220","(Hc\191\184\204")](v2[v151("\246\191i\163","\218\184\222\004\198\253\203X\003\165\245u")],v151("S\176d\158-","\017\021\194\017\247Y\006k\025\242\"p\\m\212\158"))then return Lighting[v151("\143\162=\029\247\189A>\162\186","m\201\195Si\150\2068")][v151("\v\250\167\186\196b\177\205\159\207\006\225-","QF\149\200\212\144\a\201\185\234\189c\168I\159\216")]elseif World3 then return Lighting[v151("\129\175\012","\208\210\196u\165k")][v151("\187\134\157\163\246\169c\232`4\179\v\146","B\246\233\242\205\162\204\027\156\021F\214")]end end DropFruits=function()for v0,v1 in next,plr[v151("\168\183\151(\1418I\171","\168\234\214\244C\253Y*\192C\154\029\176\252")]:GetChildren()do if then plr[v151("A\148\022G\251\224S*\192","p\017\248w>\158\146\020_\169\152g\203\022Ek")][v151("$\023l9","Div\005W\224")][v151("\181\023nq\207\029\186\232","\129\241~\015\029\160z\207\141.8\163/\246D")][v151("\155\144\159`\215\223>","x\205\249\236\t\181\179[\030\244\196\160\141")]=false end EquipWeapon(v1[v151("\197\177\242|","\000\139\208\159\025H\231gn%^Z\159")]);(plr[v151("\138\127L\206\019\227\'\b\225","\147\201\023-\188r\128Sm")]:FindFirstChild(v1[v151("\025\018S\170","sWs>\207\226^!q\bL7")]))[v151("\152\151\0219s\178\189k`","n\221\246ak\022\223\210\031\005\t")]:InvokeServer(v151("\210!\006X","\212\150Si(\021\246&{\188\024\193?\224\181"))end end for v0,v1 in pairs(plr[v151(")F\164\166\157\"\184\219\133","\136j.\197\212\252A\204\190\247b")]:GetChildren())do if string[v151("\186\182\004\167","\198\220\223j\195\193\248\225\218#(")](v1[v151("\143\241^i","v\193\1443\012\184y\001\232\223\003\205")],v151("\146\018\195\004h","\241\212`\182m\028\151\029z\209\142\235\014\171G`"))then EquipWeapon(v1[v151("8\152\208c","\\v\249\189\006R\169")])wait(.1)if plr[v151("\181:HLO\217\136\190\228","\141\229V)5*\171\207\203")][v151("\231\233pP","N\170\136\025>\233\232b")][v151("\180\182x1_\254Z\r","p\240\223\025]0\153/ht\185\241@")][v151("\130=\0141_li","\236\212T}X=\000\012\"j\138T\152\185(5")]==true then plr[v151("\n\225_\190D\220qo\169","{Z\141>\199!\1746\026\192")][v151("\244H\001\138","\173\185)h\228%\001Cg\198c-\217\235r")][v151("@\2549\146\132\023\189D","\167\004\151X\254\235p\200!y`\153\197\172\138")][v151("\187d,\012\189\027\237","h\237\r_e\223w\136j\022\142\023D\188")]=false end EquipWeapon(v1[v151("\137\168\207\224","\250\199\201\162\133\207\027\brDU")]);(plr[v151(";gs\232\140A\vj\181","\199x\015\018\154\237\"\127\015")]:FindFirstChild(v1[v151("#\243\225\173","sm\146\140\200-\155\\[[")]))[v151("\152$\139V{\209>\146A","$\221E\255\004\030\188Q\230")]:InvokeServer(v151("\017\238\157\205","3U\156\242\189KB\147\1840\216\031\173\\\138"))end end end GetBP=function(v0)return plr[v151("\196\202jLFN\201o","\156\134\171\t\'6/\170\004\1845\\\188\\\030")]:FindFirstChild(v0)or plr[v151("\182\212\134\030\211\005N\162\149","\228\245\188\231l\178f:\199\231x\158$c)S")]:FindFirstChild(v0)end GetIn=function(v0)for v1,v2 in pairs(replicated[v151("\244\181B\195I4\215","5\166\208/\172=Q\164\229\249o\197")][v151("\127A\138\a\250\168","#<.\231j\188\247;\155\166\214\a\241fm")]:InvokeServer(v151("\127/\127\234tc\218]\176\241\242X","!\024J\v\163\026\021\1913\196\158\128")))do if type(v2)==v151("\229y\031\235\131","L\145\024}\135\230\146\236^\141\a\025\131w")then if v2[v151("\165,\029\182","\144\235Mp\211\195l")]==v0 or plr[v151("H\213\179=\238\217\v\029\130","v\v\189\210O\143\186\127x\240\211o\143\019\222")]:FindFirstChild(v0)or plr[v151("^\219|\229\238\248\023\a","l\028\186\031\142\158\153tl\005\220\194")]:FindFirstChild(v0)then return true end end end return false end GetM=function(v0)for v1,v2 in pairs(replicated[v151("|?\020\133F\145\247","\025.Zy\2342\244\132\152\135\006\188")][v151("6\239\001\015E\133","\205u\128lb\003\218\005\171\020Wy\225\158")]:InvokeServer(v151("\"\196\023p\156\r\233+\213\012K\139","\140E\161c9\242{")))do if type(v2)==v151("\1749\180?\147","0\218X\214S\246o{")then if v2[v151("\196\197\r]","\178\144\188}8CK\226\195\250\226-z\128\148")]==v151("\199\232_\145\144/\219\163","\207\138\137+\244\226F\186")then pairs(replicated[v151("\173~\219Vl\190\147","\141\255\027\1829\024\219\224\194\152\219S\019")][v151("\023\179\240NA]","\173T\220\157#\a\0028x\230\214V-\254\223")]:InvokeServer(v151("\001\143\134\012\241\155\003\132\134*\237\148","\237f\234\242E\159")))do if type(v2)==v151("\203k1JD","\175\191\nS&!\233@\228")then if v2[v151("|\017\198.","H(h\182K\202\160")]==v151("\154\001\030c\174","\002\201vq\017\202 \128!\163L")then if v2[v151("\158wld","\180\208\022\001\001\236\228\209x")]==v0 or plr[v151("\249cr\183&\144\239^\241","\152\186\v\019\197G\243\155;\131\205\168 \206\245")]:FindFirstChild(v0)or plr[v151("\233\175\a\127\224\000M\173","\198\171\206d\020\144a.")]:FindFirstChild(v0)then return true end end end end return false end getInfinity_Ability=function(v0,v1)if not Root then return end if v0==v151("\213\252\180\153","\000\134\147\198\236$")and v1 then for v0,v2 in next,getgc()do if plr[v151("\014\230,\200\193\2309\235?","\133M\142M\186\160")][v151("\v\155\vN","\"X\244y;=\204\005\170g\005=o\180")]then if typeof(v2)==v151("\217\242k\190NCw\244","\222\191\135\005\221:*\024\154\180\r\241")and(getfenv(v2))[v151("\248\028\253\214\164\232","\163\139\127\143\191\212\156\166\249\187\160\227\the")]==plr[v151("\231\138\na\"(\205m\239","\127\164\226k\019CK\185\b\157")][v151("\201(\188\161","\130\154G\206\212\249-\148\194\ab")]then for v0,v2 in next,getupvalues(v2)do if typeof(v2)==v151("\200\136 \174\245","\216\188\233B\194\144f\148")then repeat wait(Sec)v2[v151("\244c\168_\153\b\238","\170\184\002\219+\204{\139\162\255>eb\'qD")]=0 until not v1 or plr[v151("&\029e\rEV\r\229\r","\137eu\004\127$5y\128\127")][v151("\173\146\133_\228\017\002\206","\r\229\231\232>\138~k\170\192\134<\n\199")][v151("w\241\174p\016W","??\148\207\028d")]<=0 end end end end end elseif v0==v151("\167}\254\237\216{","\170\226\019\155\159\191\002\182o/")and v1 then plr[v151("\130\253\237Xxz\164\180W","=\193\149\140*\025\025\208\209%A\154\245\020")][v151("\203\143h\171\137\235","\146\142\225\r\217\238")][v151("=YbwAy\144","\219~1\003\025&\028\244e\004}2}v\158")]:connect(function()if v1 then plr[v151("\191\246j\026t5\025\153\236","m\252\158\vh\021V")][v151("\183F\193V)\224","[\242(\164$N\153\177\147\152\181\138\243\133\250\174")][v151("^\198\235\025\223","R\b\167\135l\186:$")]=Energy end end)elseif v0==v151("!\247r\211J\167\202\222\233GQ","!n\149\001\1828\209\171\170\128(?")and v1 then local v0=plr[v151("\178\254\000F\190G\209_\015\204\153\165","\021\228\151s/\209)\131>k\165\236\214")]v0[v151("\148V\155\198\025"," tonumber(v1[v151("<z\186\002a","|\127\021\207l\021\201\228\156\169\185\179")])<12 then TeleportService:TeleportToPlaceInstance(game[v151("!a-\000y\240U","\150q\rLc\028\1851U\012\250\219\155\226!")],v0)end end end end)end local v32=Instance[v151("\129\222e","\217\239\187\018\188-\222\199")](v151("8\191\2273","\173h\222\145G\165^\027xPS\234>,\227"),workspace)v32[v151("\246\186\190\217","\b\165\211\196\188\167\138\026\154")]=Vector3[v151("wi(","\209\025\012_P3\216\166")](1,1,1)v32[v151("\016O\026\179","\163^.w\214\231\030\153\246\018\b")]=v151("\232\199\187;\012z\147\216\219","\170\186\174\203dE\020\247")v32[v151("@\219L3\232\1436\211","\176\001\181/[\135\253S\183(G\181")]=true then v33:Destroy()end task[v151("\165?\193\2432","\195\214O\160\132\\\159\025\222\181\246\156B\216\169")](function()while task[v151("\v\029.\135","\246||G\243\232\164\127\247\029")]()do if v32 and task[v151("\185\252*\205","v\206\157C\185t\241\181\129+=")]()until v0[v151("(\186\209c\175\151@\128\b","\129k\210\176\017\206\2444\229z")]and task[v151("\172Y\162\243","\211\2198\203\135\175\024\216_\129-kC9\207\255")]()do pcall(function()if(getgenv())[v151("9\237o\130\252\022","\191v\131)\227\142{")]then if v32 and v32[v151("\208\132\243\220gK","\209\128\229\129\185\t?\142p\215")]==workspace then local v1=v0[v151("\206\136xY\018\220Q\232\146","%\141\224\025+s\191")]and v0[v151("\223\226\006i\215.\154\188\177","\031\156\138g\027\182M\238\217\195X")][v151("\229\233\148\004\015\227\143U\026\145\006","r\181\155\253in\145\246\005{\227")]if v1 and(v1[v151("\020Zh\159\220\224\b\t","\173D5\027\246\168\137gg\220usN\146O")]-v32[v151("\254\214\172\017L\238\028\023","\132\174\185\223x8\135sy")])[v151("\019\154\204\aO\r\031:\158","j^\251\171i&y")]<=200 then v1[v151("\000\232\\\195\227\219","\030C\174.\162\142\190\170\017\128q\133\182")]=v32[v151("\176\248{^m\170","\173\243\190\t?\000\207\184\027\153\225\191")]else v32[v151("\166U<_(\181","\252\229\019N>E\208")]=v1[v151("\t\149<\029\224\241","JJ\211N|\141\148m\205\185")]end end local v1=v0[v151("\176\220\211\020\152\224\172\012\129","i\243\180\178f\249\131\216")]if v1 then for v0,v1 in pairs(v1:GetChildren())do if v1:IsA(v151("\179d=A\164.\025\233","\177\241\005N$\244Ok\157\216C\019-"))then v1[v151("\1405dO\016A] [;","#\207T\n\012\127-1I?^k\243\223\249")]=false end end end else local v1=v0[v151("\158\142y\164\180\193\014\140M","\241\221\230\024\214\213\162z\233?\219kQAv\158")]if v1 then for v0,v1 in pairs(v1:GetChildren())do if v1:IsA(v151("&\160\188q\000\238\140e","\218d\193\207\020P\143\254\0172\154b\180w"))then v1[v151("oU\212\133\183=\136f\215\179","M,4\186\198\216Q\228\015\179\214\221\012")]=true end end end end end)end end)_tp=function(v0)local v1=plr[v151(">$Yy\200\006\155[\207","\178}L8\v\169e\239>\189\014\252\141\1632")]if not v1 or not v1:FindFirstChild(v151("Ar\192\138\133\171\182\219\a\181\178\238\196\171\170}","\216\t\a\173\235\235\196\223\191U\218\221\154\148\202"))then return end local v2=v1[v151("\191\207\222\173{\005\178Z\017Rn\131\234\210\190a","\001\247\186\179\204\021j\219>C=")]local v3=(v0[v151("\181\175\140@\234\212e\187","\213\229\192\255)\158\189\n")]-v2[v151("\147\152\202o\142\187\172\153","\210\195\247\185\006\250")])[v151("\178d\027\137\156\174\141&[",">\255\005|\231\245\218\248B")]local v4=TweenInfo[v151("\135Eo","}\233 v5=(game:GetService(v151("\219\022aNp3\132\253\023mH{","\225\143a\004+\030`"))):Create(v32,v4,{[v151("\239\218\220\022\169\019","\171\172\156\174w\196v\134\163\179")]=v0})if plr[v151("\142\188\152\017\139\221\027\131\191","\230\205\212\249c\234\190o")][v151("\241i\197E\v\212\002\160","\t\185\028\168$e\187k\196i\170\142\183\006(")][v151("v\184\251","\140%\209\143\194\195\217\195\246\131\207(\168\133\238\167")]==true then v32[v151("\241\005\127\216c\175","\177\178C\r\185\014\202\254+8\227")]=CFrame[v151("q\146+","\023\031\247\\\146l")](v32[v151("\2295\153\017\193\228\b\167","\n\181Z\234x\181\141g\201z\235")][v151("\187","\180\227\241\018\196\155R\250\186sz(\181\015\198")],v0[v151("\232","\023\177\2347\240\173\191\132\020")],v32[v151("\188\184\127\209\144\a\129\204","\162\236\215\012\184\228n\238")][v151("\189","\213\231\003\225\192A;2\129\019\030~\vj")])end v5:Play()task[v151("\186\136\188\229\163","\236\201\248\221\146\205=")](function()while v5[v151("\012\\\170:\130\163T\233\022,\239\128\r","\196\\0\203C\224\1947\130EX\142\244hs9")]==Enum[v151("\195-g\148\023\205\156\198\220-\178\137|","\232\147A\006\237u\172\255\173\143Y\211\253\025I")][v151("%Db\159\237D\250","\251u(\003\230\132*\157\150\002")]do if not shouldTween then v5:Cancel()break end task[v151("\r\202>\164","\203z\171W\208\186")](.1)end end)end TeleportToTarget=function(v0)if(v0[v151("\206\177|B\023\204]$","\171\158\222\015+c\1652J\206\231\019\168\166!\195")]-plr[v151("\227C7\222%F\"\227P","\162\160+V\172D%V\134\"\151")][v151("\181E\221T\031Y\150u\175_\223A!W\141e","\017\2530\1765q6\255")][v151("\236\254\215E\000\139-\t","$\188\145\164,t\226Bg\127\227 notween=function(v0)plr[v151("\022\149\005\025\247\182\2380\143","\154U\253dk\150\213")][v151("\140\148\005h:`\173\133:f;{\148\128\026}","\015\196\225h\tT")][v151("\150m\000\'\n\157","\173\213+rFg\248\192\244\029")]=v0 end function BTP(v0)local v1=game[v151("\234\020\184\191\198e\162","\167\186x\217\198\163\023\209")][v151("6(\182^\218A\025\'\161\187\\","\169zG\213?\182\017uF\216\222.\143\234\0296")]local v2=v1[v151("\141-a\0315=\186 r","^\206E\000mT")][v151("\021\152\171\n\147Jr9\191\169\004\137uz/\153","\027]\237\198k\253%")]local v3=v1[v151(".=)<\002\252\002\b\'","vmUHNc\159")][v151("\026\128\229\155\207<;\145","SR\245\136\250\161")]local v6=v2[v151("zNG\137\231\141D\025","w*!4\224\147\228+")]repeat v3[v151("\199\158\166\000\143\171","\195\143\251\199l\251")]=0 v2[v151("q\189\177\174\001\246","\2152\251\195\207l\147\018c")]=v0 v6=v2[v151("\236-\205\\\251\242\024h","\237\188B\1905\143\155w\006\146\166A\aHvh")]v2[v151("\252\194\136\186\231\144","\130\191\132\250\219\138\245\194\2048\194\156\004\206\n")]=v0 end task[v151("\014\233,\025","%y\136Em\241\000k\'2\157\198")](.5)until(v0[v151("\208\217Q\231,\148\199\238","\168\128\182\"\142X\253")]-v2[v151("\168\231\241/\243\163)\235","P\248\136\130F\135\202F\133S\151")])[v151("N\029H\012r\211|\r\128","\158\003|/b\027\167\ti\229\250\134")]<=2000 end end QuestBeta=function()local v0=QuestB()return{[0]=_G[v151("\143\001\248\219,\199\138\029","\240\201h\150\191n\168\249n\151\2152")],[1]=bMon,[2]=Qdata;[3]=Qname,[4]=PosB,[5]=PosQBoss}end QuestCheck=function()local v3=(v1[v151("\244\196)\241\145\132\021\158","\n\164\171Z\152\229\237z\240\165\234\138\014C")]-v0)[v151("\142\228\208\183\a\t1\132x","F\195\133\183\217n}D\224\029")]if v3>=v2 then v1={[1]={[v151("\147\r\184M\rc\189\142\024\186Z","\216\192y\215?l\004")]=v0,[v151("Cl\253\175","R\023\021\141\202\028U\142\159Y\182")]=v151("JZxq\210W\139e","\226\v/\n\016\129<"),[v151("E\204au\207a}","P\006\163\015\001\170\025\t\144\158a\b9R;)")]=v151("\208\199\222\148f","3\149\182\171\253\022c\1460")}};(((replicated:WaitForChild(v151("\198\005\174\188\152l\248","\t\139j\202\201\244"))):WaitForChild(v151("\031\240\236","\199Q\149\152\204\245\166\003\138\017\167/\127xo"))):WaitForChild(v151("\180\149\175\165U\165\141iZ\245N\146\188\237\138]\181\150O_","=\230\211\128\227\'\208\228\029\025\128"))):InvokeServer(unpack(v1))end tostring(v0[v151("\183\r\t\005\001\159\239\153\016\018","\128\245\127`fj\220")])==v151("\219\208\223\145I-\227\242\220\220","\145\151\185\178\244iJ")end end HakiCalculate=function(v0)local v1={[v151("\004\143!\206N\205b\165\147Q","~V\234@\162\"\180B\215\2465&\028\238\201\005")]=v151("|`\127\tk\141\161\145","\192,\021\rlK\223\196\245\214P7\\\172\187\187");[v151("r\014\174V\157I","\138=w\221\"\248;")]=v151("p)&\253\230*db=F","I#GI\138\198}\012\v"),[v151("\153\224\171\197\151\253\176\235","y\209\143\223\229\231\148\222\128E!")]=v151("\014\147\176}\182\205\180P\1397","\016Y\250\222\t\211\191\148\003\224NL")}if v1=workspace[v151("$\134-","bi\231]\172G")][v151("\139\147\018\017\141@\167\210$\030\138Q\175\151","%\195\242g\127\249")][v151("\203\191\230\233%\246","\193\159\222\132\133@\130")][v151("\249U4\173i\201W\155","#\1700S\192\012\167")][v151("\232M\189\179","\154\164$\211\214rD\029\221u\170\157\137\218\194\167")][v151("\209\159\022\213T\239\233r","N\131\240b\180 v1=workspace[v151("@\171D","\147\r\2024\235\209\235z\001\166>")][v151("\030+\184\028R\212\14269r\127\177:/","\197VJ\205r&\177\234\022z\019\012")][v151("C\208;\143\144\199","\154\023\177Y\227\245\179\157\015\210\208")][v151("*\181\134Up=\024\250","\201y\208\2258\021Sl")][v151("\183\200\021\b","\245\251\161{mKDN\161\015\145")][v151("/\184\177\144\251nbj","\014}\215\197\241\143\a\r\004\140\2337\200\015`\163")]elseif v1=workspace[v151("BoL","A\015\014<AHM?\240\162\245\244\220J\017")][v151("\r\206\014\254\181\188\234\142\220X\169\132\143 v1=workspace[v151("=g\212","\162p\006\164\174\1380*")][v151("\170C\215\253\159yP\134\209\026\180\\\142G","(\226\"\162\147\235\0284\166\146{\199")][v151("\128\146\157\155;\000=\177","\170\212\224\242\235SiX\194\129\141\204o\003u\026")][v151("W\208}Q\159","A\006\165\024\"\235G\129\210\216\012\251\197")]local v2 for v1,v3 in pairs(v1:GetChildren())do if v0==1 and(v3[v151("6wN\127",".x\022#\026\179~\173\166n\252")]==v151("\183\244\210\203)N\210","7\227\134\189\187A")and v2=v3[v151("\181\029\1342\019\246","\178\253|\232V\127\147\\\238\018\247")][v151("+z\196\234\214+\221R","<y\021\176\139\162B\178")]elseif v0==2 v1=v44[v151("\224&\029>:","\156\164T|YUy\216\241,\175")]:AddToggle(v151("&\195\188\188\141\147\197","nd\175\221\198\232\214\136\207\169"),{[v151("6K\251n6","Ab\"\143\002S\238o\204\028(a\243\216\224\b")]=v151("F\229u\129P11\226\249GH\223\133;w\238b\226","\154\a\144\001\238puC\131\158(&\255\205N\025"),[v151(")<\148\137\234:d\199N\0027","\'mY\231\234\152S\020\179")]=v151("\240\217\202I\138\177db\157\157\'1\226\229\222\213\a\200\178k8\158\2100|\230\225\222\152\012\138\191\1276\148\2106~\232\232\201\219S\138\188f#\129\151ut\233\230\201\202","\132\132\172\184\'\170\222\nB\251\242U\017"),[v151("\22907s!\024\193","\005\161UQ\018Tt\181\166b\134\212\025")]=false})v1:OnChanged(function(v0)_G[v151("z\243ZV\000\004\205\128<\215R","\031<\146(;Bh\172\250Y\146")]=v0 v0={[1]={[v151("\213\149\211\015\128\232\226","\144\150\250\189{\229")]=v151("\bf\172TQ\183\217\255\224=(\209","\160Z\003\221!4\196\173\174\149X[\165")}};((((game:GetService(v151("q\234\203?u]\155\188\197\145cZC\017\137D\234","\232#\143\187S\028>\250\200\160\2450.,c"))):WaitForChild(v151("x\161\135\202\175&\015","\2475\206\227\191\195C|\189\231\227\233GU"))):WaitForChild(v151("\233%<","3\167@Ht\131"))):WaitForChild(v151("H\195\185\176\187\231T\174\148f\004\135\156\029\127","~\026\133\150\244\201\1343\193\250.q\233\232x\r"))):InvokeServer(unpack(v0))end)local v2,v3=pcall(function()v1=((((game:GetService(v151("\131\195\127\147\181\195\162\165\195k\172\168\207\177\176\193j","\195\209\166\015\255\220\160"))):WaitForChild(v151("\133,,\18424\154","\127\200CH\205^Q\233l\197\129\012\204\""))):WaitForChild(v151("\203\139\173","\193\133\238\217x\194r\018\168p\218-\164"))):WaitForChild(v151("\215w\129\186f\152\238\150\157\236\210\208\241T\220","\190\1331\174\254\020\249\137\249\243\164\167"))):InvokeServer(unpack(v0))end)local v4=false local v5 local v6 local v7 if v1 then if v1[v151("ks\228\219","\241?\022\156\175\014\213\159\'H\t\236\246")]then v4=true local v4,v6,v5,v7 end BackTODoJo=function()for v0,v1 in return true end end end return false end DragonMobClear=function(v0,v1,v2)if workspace[v151("\187\168v\017\153\001\175","h\254\198\019|\240d\220\236\224(\180")]:FindFirstChild(v1)then for v2,v3 in AdvanFruitEsp=function()if advanEsp==true then for v0,v1 in pairs(replicated[v151("\179\152_W","\200\253\200\028$\209oLc\217|\001}t\136")]:GetChildren())do if v1[v151("#\239\252R","\am\142\1457\205P8\1743\168\179\215\239\252")]==v151(",z\228\224u\195\128~MX\224\244r\212\197^\b\127\254\228i","\026m\030\146\129\027\160\229")then if not ChestEsp=function()if ChestESP then local v0=game:GetService(v151("1\250\154\145C\250\006\252\153\147u\252\000\227\159\158C","\153r\149\246\253&"))local v3=v2[v151("%\248\178\012(\020A\200\000",":f\144\211~Iw5\173r\245@\016\213")]or v2[v151("\'\215\233o\146\218\230\231\022\254\236y\150\221","\130d\191\136\029\243\185\146")]:Wait()local v4=(v3:GetPivot())[v151("\227\244\147\142\157\"\"\026","\005\179\155\224\231\233KMt\230L\018")]local v5=v0:GetTagged(v151("\028\249\171\246\018\228t\001\146]>E","\142C\186\195\147a\144 v6=(v0-v4)[v151("\149\181Q\211)\189\205\016\138","\239\216\2126\189@\201\184t")]local v0,v1=v3(game[v151("G\128\1896#\031\t","Q\023\236\220UFVmh\012Z3#\143\211\210")])game[v151("\1485;\t\r\130\202\162\020_u\213\002\178?=6\022\149\234\166\003V","c\198ZYeb\250\152\199d3\028\182")][v151("Y\015\2279$\250H\0277\016\191v\154>\194S\014\251$1\252h22\006\187P\154#","\177\026`\141ME\153<W^c\203?\232W")]:FireServer(game[v151("hTCzQ\156\\","\21388\"\0254")],v151("","\237\024\235y(\217\162:!\147"),v0)else end)spawn(function()while wait(Sec)do pcall(function()if _G[v151("\149\245HO\198\219\016\232\239a\208\202","\015\197\154:;\167\183E\134\163\014\179\161\243")]then if replicated[v151("\024\174?$\148\192\142","\232J\203RK\224\165\253\247\195\250\156")][v151("\005Q\130\026c\225","AF>\239w%\190\241\250b")]:InvokeServer(v151("!\020\199\231ZY\005.F\234\031\001\238\148\207","1Sq\182\146?*qk(\158m`\128\247\170"),Vector3[v151("\\#;","G2FL1\254\247\220r")](-12471.169921875,374.94024658203,-7551.677734375))elseif and v1:FindFirstChild(v151("\191\251+k/\215\140\205&c8","\187\233\158C\002L")))then return true,v1[v151("\171.\0052)|","\r\238@b[G\025\132\254")][v151("@\135]\187+\006^W","z\016\232.\210_o19")]end end end Actived=function()local v0=game[v151("\232n0{\213\0299","\186\184\002Q\002\176oJ\192\169\2468\241")][v151("\127\187\249\236H\156\249\238J\177\232","\1433\212\154\141$\204\149")][v151("\161\181 next,getconnections(v0[v151("A0\127\196\173\229L\176\172","\197\000S\v\173\219\1328\213\2004C")])do if v150-v148>=v149 then game[v151("c\247;\210\201\207\172g>\014","\2130\131Z\160\189\170\222 end v35:SelectTab(1)
